title: Tests: room_hpke_keypair() — MLS epoch export determinism and isolation
description:
What: Test suite for MlsClient::room_hpke_keypair() verifying determinism across members and isolation between epochs.

Algorithm:
1. Read /home/mark/WORK/nie/core/src/mls.rs (especially test helpers)
2. Add tests to mls.rs test module:
3. Test 1: no_group_returns_err
   - let client = MlsClient::new("test-pub-id").unwrap()
   - assert!(client.room_hpke_keypair().is_err())
   - Oracle: method contract (no group → Err)
4. Test 2: same_epoch_same_key (two members derive identical key)
   - Create MlsClient admin (alice) and member (bob)
   - Alice creates group; adds Bob (returns commit + welcome)
   - Bob joins from welcome
   - alice_keys = alice.room_hpke_keypair()?
   - bob_keys = bob.room_hpke_keypair()?
   - assert_eq!(alice_keys.0, bob_keys.0)  // same secret
   - assert_eq!(alice_keys.1, bob_keys.1)  // same public key
   - Oracle: MLS export_secret is deterministic for all members in same epoch
5. Test 3: new_epoch_rotates_key (add member rotates key)
   - Setup alice + bob in group (epoch 1)
   - keys_epoch1 = alice.room_hpke_keypair()?
   - Alice creates carol MlsClient, adds carol to group (epoch 2)
   - keys_epoch2 = alice.room_hpke_keypair()?
   - assert_ne!(keys_epoch1.1, keys_epoch2.1)  // public key changed
   - Oracle: different MLS epochs produce different export_secret values
6. Test 4: key_separation (X25519 key != Ed25519 identity seed)
   - In Identity::generate(), the Ed25519 seed and X25519 seed must differ
   - This test is in identity.rs, not mls.rs
   - Verify: identity.hpke_secret_bytes() != identity.secret_bytes()
7. Run cargo test -p nie-core mls (with the new tests included)

Defensive programming rules:
- Do NOT use room_hpke_keypair() as its own oracle; same_epoch test compares two INDEPENDENT clients
- The two-member test is the critical validation: two clients independently call export_secret and get the same result
- epoch_rotates test validates the automatic key rotation property
- Tests must set up real MLS group state (not mock); use existing test infrastructure in mls.rs
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-core passes; 3+ tests for room_hpke_keypair run; same-epoch test verifies two independent clients get identical keys; epoch-rotation test verifies keys differ
